summary: First iteration of end-to-end testing for ProfitEngine. CLI pytest suite (15/15 pass). Backend API suite of 9 tests written under /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py — all 9 PASS via the external REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend Playwright e2e covering landing sections, demo report, Python merge, JS/TS merge (with language switcher), and waitlist signup — all 5 flows PASS. No issues found; the build is production-ready for the described scope.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] direct subscript — good (fails fast). load_dotenv is called explicitly with the .env path which is correct.

Stats endpoint streams merge_events via async for — fine for current scale, but if events grow large consider using count_documents + an aggregation $sum on the 'upgrades' field instead of in-process accumulation.
PyObjectId() helper in server.py (lines 52-53) is defined but never used — minor dead code.
/api/merge inserts a record into merge_events even if the merge produced zero upgrades; that is intentional (counts files merged) but worth noting in any future analytics work.
All endpoints use Pydantic v2 schemas, EmailStr validation works (422 on bad email confirmed). HTTP status codes correct (400 on syntax error, 422 on invalid input).
test_credentials: None — endpoints are open per agent-to-agent context.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed waitlist entries (UUID-suffixed) and a handful of merge_events records. These are isolated and named with TEST_ prefix; safe to drop. No production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py and run via `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_backend_api.py -v`. CLI tests at /app/code_merger/tests/. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Frontend testid coverage is excellent — every interactive element has data-testid. /api/stats has baselines (files_merged_total+1284, devs_joined+312, upgrades_applied+4827, repos_analyzed+47), so assert increments rather than absolute deltas.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — nothing to RCA.
